meaning: n.诺丁汉(英国中北部郡名,该郡首府)
examples: The Sheriff of Nottingham killed his father.
The King held a council at Nottingham from 14 to 19 October 1330.
He holds bachelor's degrees from Nottingham University and Acadia University.
The Nottingham-born forward was ever-present in Southampton's Championship campaign last season, scoring 12 goals.
The goalkeeper's good form, plus an injury to Nottingham Forest's Darren Ward, gives Margetson his chance.
